signals.npcLine: Markets bleed; digital ghosts vanish fast tonight.
signals.questPulse: Seek out fallen chains; value collapses silently.
signals.worldFeed: Global cryptos dive; shadow traders hesitate.
signals.clueEvent: Whisper of mass sell-off under neon haze.

signals.npcLine: Fear grip tight; algorithmic traps spike in data streams.
signals.questPulse: Harvest risk signals; trust no pulse unverified.
signals.worldFeed: Network nodes jitter; sentiment sinks low.
signals.clueEvent: Silent sell orders flood the darknet crypts.

signals.npcLine: Symbols shift: CHIP fades, ASTEROID stirs underground.
signals.questPulse: Decode trending ghosts; power hides in chaos.
signals.worldFeed: New tokens spark whispers but draw wary eyes.
signals.clueEvent: Low-score tags hint at silent takeovers.

signals.npcLine: RAVE and MAGA pulse erratic; watch the feeds.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate network chatter; profit from unstable zones.
signals.worldFeed: Volatile tokens blur lines between ally and enemy.
signals.clueEvent: Uneasy energy around mid-tier cryptos tonight.

signals.npcLine: Old-school barter rising; trust in circuits crumbles.
signals.questPulse: Find analog trades; digital trust erodes fast.
signals.worldFeed: Fear drives many to forgotten markets and blackouts.
signals.clueEvent: Subcultures revive physical exchanges beneath neon rain.
